name: yt2anki
description: Create Anki cards from YouTube videos for German learning

scripts.bookmarklet: node scripts/build-bookmarklet.js && cat bookmarklet/bookmarklet.txt | pbcopy && echo 'Video bookmarklet copied to clipboard'
scripts.bookmarklet:text: node scripts/build-text-bookmarklet.js && cat bookmarklet/text-bookmarklet.txt | pbcopy && echo 'Text bookmarklet copied to clipboard'
